mistakes.plain_english: Your upper body is leaning behind your hips when you strike the ball. This sends shots upward and reduces accuracy.
mistakes.cause: Plant foot placed too far behind the ball, or insufficient core engagement.
mistakes.fix: Position your plant foot beside the ball. Drive your chest forward and down over the ball at contact.

mistakes.display: Ball too far from feet while dribbling
mistakes.plain_english: The ball is too far in front of you while running with it. Defenders can easily take it.
mistakes.cause: Pushing the ball too hard per touch, or running too fast for skill level.
mistakes.fix: Take smaller, more controlled touches. Keep the ball within 1 touch range at all times.

mistakes.plain_english: Your knee falls inward when you plant your foot. This reduces power transfer and increases injury risk.
mistakes.cause: Weak hip abductor muscles allowing medial knee drift.
mistakes.fix: Strengthen hip abductors. Consciously push knee over middle toe during all weight-bearing movements.

mistakes.plain_english: Your left and right running steps are noticeably different. One leg is doing more work, which tires you out faster.
mistakes.cause: Strength imbalance between dominant and non-dominant leg.
mistakes.fix: Unilateral strength and plyometric work to equalise both sides.

mistakes.display: Diving in too early when defending
mistakes.plain_english: You are lunging for the ball before the attacker makes a mistake. This leaves you beaten easily.
mistakes.cause: Impatience. Trying to win the ball rather than delaying the attack.
mistakes.fix: Jockey and delay. Wait for the heavy touch or a mistake before committing.

mistakes.plain_english: You are always using your stronger foot even when your weaker foot would be easier. This makes you predictable.
mistakes.cause: Lack of confidence in the non-dominant foot due to insufficient practice.
mistakes.fix: Dedicate at least 30% of passing practice to your weaker foot.

mistakes.display: Stopping the kicking motion at contact
mistakes.plain_english: Your leg stops moving after it hits the ball. This reduces power and accuracy.
mistakes.cause: Nervousness, or focusing too hard on the ball at contact.
mistakes.fix: Mentally commit to kicking through the ball, not at it. Finish with your kicking foot pointing at the target.
